Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Aion]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — A Navigator is hired to sail across the Aion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The Aion is a location where Elders stir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — The Aion is a body of water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — The Aion contains creatures that hunt by night and are lured to a glow on the surface of the water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — The Aion is a location containing hazards like wormclouds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Aion is a region or space crossed by Navigators using Elderspawn guides.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — The Aion contains things that can sense the Lyathatan approaching.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — The Consultants are traveling the Aion quickly without a Navigator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Aion is a place where unspeakable creatures are lured by power, conflict, and blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Calder has sailed the Aion for years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — The Aion is a location from which Elder creatures can be summoned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The island is located in the middle of the Aion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — The Aion is a body of water that Navigators cross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Calder Marten was exiled to the Aion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — The Children of Nakothi have been spotted swimming around the Aion.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — The Aion is a vast blue expanse.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — The Aion contains floating islands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — The Aion is a depth located beneath the debris field.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — Nakothi is rumored to wait at the bottom of the Aion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Scouts in the Aion reported a Navigator's ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — A Navigator set out into the Aion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — The Dead Mother screamed from somewhere out on the Aion.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — The Aion contains many hazards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — The Aion is a location where one might face Elder influence while on a ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — The sparks are born of the Aion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Aion is a location where Elder cultists might exist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Persistence is an admirable trait on the Aion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — The Aion is a shallow sea covered by the Navigator fleet's sails and banners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — The Aion is a sea that can be traveled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 24''' — The characters are more experienced on the Aion.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — Three boxes are going to float out to the Aion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor risked himself on a distant island in the Aion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — The Aion is a sea where sailors pass clouds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — The Aion is a location that can be traveled.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — The Aion is a location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — One could flee Imperial justice into the Aion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 18''' — The Aion has shallow areas.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
